name: RAYMOND JAMES FINANCIAL INC
summary: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (RJF) is a diversified financial services company established in 1962, listed on NYSE. It provides private client group services, capital markets, asset management, banking, and trust services to individuals, corporations, and municipalities. Key offerings include investment advisory, brokerage, M&A advisory, equity/debt underwriting, institutional sales, corporate and retail banking, and affordable housing investment syndication, operating primarily in the U.S. and to a lesser extent in Canada, the UK, and Europe.

products.name: Private Client Group (PCG)
products.description: Financial planning, investment advisory, and securities transaction services for retail clients via employee and independent contractor financial advisors.

products.name: Raymond James Bank Deposit Program (RJBDP)
products.description: Multi-bank sweep program directing client cash deposits to various third-party banks, generating servicing fees.

products.name: RIA and Custody Services (RCS)
products.description: Custodial services, trade execution, research, and support for third-party RIAs and broker-dealers.

products.name: Capital Markets
products.description: Investment banking including M&A advisory, equity and debt underwriting, institutional brokerage, and equity research.

products.name: Asset Management Services (AMS)
products.description: Portfolio management and administrative services for retail PCG fee-based accounts using in-house or third-party portfolio managers.

products.name: Raymond James Investment Management
products.description: Active asset management for retail, institutional accounts, and proprietary mutual funds via in-house or third-party managers.

products.name: Affordable Housing Investments
products.description: Syndication and management of investments in tax credit-qualifying low-income housing funds to help institutions meet CRA obligations.

products.name: AdvisorChoice
products.description: Multiple affiliation options for financial advisors including employee, independent contractor, and RCS models.
